title: Most Gathered Materials
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Name) FROM MaterialCollected WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Name_Localised, Name) AS label, CAST(SUM(Count) AS INTEGER) AS value FROM MaterialCollected WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Name ORDER BY value DESC
